item.title:

Christian Kist delivers a comfortable 6-2 victory over Madars Razm
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min KIST ROLLS PAST RAZMA!
Christian Kist delivers a comfortable 6-2 victory over Madars Razma to move into round three at #PC10

item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 18min 𝗕𝗲𝗮𝘂 𝗚𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘃𝗲𝘀 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝗥𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲
Beau Greaves has beaten Dennie Olde Kalter to move into the last
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 18min 𝗕𝗲𝗮𝘂 𝗚𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘃𝗲𝘀 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝗥𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲
Beau Greaves has beaten Dennie Olde Kalter to move into the last 32 in Wigan.
Raymond van Barneveld and Cameron Menzies are also there but Peter Wright has lost to Kevin Doets 6-4.
Yesterday's winner Chris Dobey is also Mostrar más 1 87
